title: IONite Powered
description: This mod is primary used to offer items and other things usable in data packs and the alike
body:
![Ionite-Powered](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentSplinter/Ionite-Powered/refs/heads/main/Images/ionite_powered_logo.png)
##

--- **Ionite Powered** is both a tech mod and lib mod that introduces a brand-new late-game energy system, advanced alloys, and a few machinery to Minecraft At its core, the mod revolves around **Ionite FE (IFE)** a volatile, high-capacity energy type that can be harnessed through reactors and converted into vast amounts of Forge Energy (FE) --- ## Advanced Energy Harness volatile energy with new multiblock reactors and power systems - **Ionite FE (IFE)** – volatile, high-capacity energy - **Phase Reactor** – generates huge amounts of FE and produces Plasma - **Ionite Reactor** – generates Ionite FE and minimal FE ![Advanced Energy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentSplinter/Ionite-Powered/refs/heads/main/Images/reactors.png) --- ## New Components Build advanced machines with new alloys and electronics. - **Mats**: Copper Alloy, Steel, Silver, Tungsten, Wuffram Alloy. - **Electronics**: Transformers, Silicon Boards, Rectifiers, Micro Computers, Thyristors, Fans, Servo Motors, Control Computers, Compressors, Ports. --- ## 💧 Fluids & Cells Produce and handle specialized fluids with modular storage - **Fluids**: Heavy Water, Liquid Nitrogen, Deuterium, Plasma - **Cells**: Store, transport, and automate fluids in compact units --- ## 🌍 World Generation Explore unique structures and plants for late-game resources - **Crashed Spaceship** – Phase Crystals and Ionite Rods - **Sunken Spaceship** – Underwater variant - **Cargo Bay** – Very rare loot-filled wreckage ![World Gen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentSplinter/Ionite-Powered/refs/heads/main/Images/crashed_ships.png) --- ## 💰 Economy System Expand beyond tech with bartering and trading - **Coins** and **Jewelry** for transactions - **Crates** for bulk trading - **Banking system** for safe storage and exchanges ![Economy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tEsWHbTT/images/65cc886464458850b77397329b0a708b3afc8e11_350.webp) ![Trading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tEsWHbTT/images/940bdef4f6e89e3e512185198740b684de5cec23_350.webp) --- ## Notes - All recipes are available in-game via JEI - Requires NeoForge or Forge - Balanced for late game progression - Some Textures may be used from other mods under the MIT License - It is recommend to run this with another mod that adds pipes/cables ---
